checks.name: Safari Zone entry route charges 5000 points and creates a per-user instance
Safari Zone current route serves instanced biome data and respawns after 20-60 seconds
Safari Zone snack route limits runs to 3 Poké Snacks and boosts catch rate for the current spawn
Safari Zone catch route sends caught Pokémon to caught_pokemon / My Pokemon
Wilds page contains Safari Zone entry button
Safari Zone page displays biome, snacks, spawn timer, and encounter actions
